title: Rent Catamaran in Marbella Port: Costs, Boats & Tips for 2026
html:
Marbella Port on the Costa del Sol is a prime departure point for catamaran charters, with prices for a half-day trip typically starting from around 1,200 EUR. BoatHire24 connects you directly with verified local operators, making it simple to compare and book your ideal day on the water.

Where to set off in Marbella Port

Marbella Port, officially Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, offers direct access to the Mediterranean Sea. Nearby Puerto Banús is the most famous marina, lined with luxury yachts and boutiques. Other launching points include Cabopino Marina to the east and the small harbour at San Pedro de Alcántara. From here, you can cruise to the Bay of Málaga, the island of Isla de las Palomas in Fuengirola, or anchor off the coast of Benalmádena. One option worth a look is the Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft charter page.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right catamaran depends on your group size and budget. A 40 ft catamaran suits a family of six for a relaxed half-day, while larger vessels accommodate bigger parties.

  1. Day-cruiser catamaran (40-50 ft), ideal for small groups of 6, 8, from 1,500 EUR per half-day.
  2. Luxury catamaran (55-70 ft), spacious for up to 12 guests, with flybridge and full galley, from 2,500 EUR per full day.
  3. Crewed catamaran, includes skipper and host, perfect for corporate trips or celebrations, from 3,000 EUR for a full day.
  4. Catamaran with water toys, a growing trend in 2026, offering paddleboards and snorkel gear, from 2,800 EUR for a full-day charter. For a closer look at a top model, visit the Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft charter page.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran in Marbella Port?

Prices vary widely; expect to pay between 1,200 EUR and 3,500 EUR for a full-day charter. The following breakdown gives typical costs for different experiences.

  • Shared catamaran tour: from 90 EUR per person for a half-day.
  • Small motorboat half-day (6-8 pax): from 400 EUR.
  • Catamaran full-day private (12 pax): from 2,500 EUR.
  • Crewed luxury catamaran full-day with gourmet catering: from 3,500 EUR.

To compare verified boat listings and find the best deal for your group, browse yacht charter in Marbella Port on BoatHire24.

Do you need a licence to rent a catamaran in Marbella Port?

For bareboat hire you need a valid ICC or equivalent, but most catamarans are offered crewed so no licence is required. Spanish law requires boaters driving a vessel over 6 metres to hold a recreational licence; however, charter companies typically include a professional skipper. Always confirm with the operator whether a licence is needed for your specific booking.

The best time for catamaran charters in Marbella Port is June through September, when the Poniente wind keeps the sea calm and the sun is reliable. Book at least two weeks ahead in July.

At a glance

  • Price band: 1,200, 3,500 EUR per day
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Guest capacity: 6, 12 passengers
  • Currency: EUR (Euro)

Questions about boat rental in Marbella Port

What is the cancellation policy for a catamaran charter in Marbella?

Most operators offer free cancellation up to 48 hours before departure, but always check the specific terms on the listing.

Can I bring my own food and drink on a catamaran hire?

Many charters allow you to bring your own provisions, though some include a crew-prepared menu; it is best to confirm in advance.

Are there any hidden fees for fuel or mooring in Marbella Port?

All-inclusive charters cover fuel and mooring fees, but budget operators may add extras, so read the BoatHire24 listing details carefully.

How far in advance should I book a catamaran for a summer weekend in 2026?

For July and August weekends, reserve at least three to four weeks ahead to secure your preferred vessel.

Whether you are planning a family outing or a corporate celebration, hiring a catamaran in Marbella Port offers a memorable day on the Mediterranean. If you own a boat, you can become a host on BoatHire24 and reach thousands of travellers looking for their next charter. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella Port or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella Port and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
